title: Zelda CD-I Animation: The lost instruction book
description:
WATCH YOU! THIS IS SOME OLD SHITTY ANIMATION!

The King and Link were playing their new game when they discovered a horrible thing... THERE IS NO ENCLOSE INSTRUCTION BOOK! So the King send Gwonam and a strange gay man to find it!

Made with Artoonix!

WWW.ARTOONIX.COM
